历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 20252 → 23728 → 53558 → 30337 → 29258. An abnormal drop occurred in 2023 (53558). Excluding this anomaly, the rankings in recent two years stabilized in the 29000–30500 range, with a baseline of about 29258 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning Province from 2021 to 2025 was 12, 13, 13, 14, 14 students respectively, showing a slight expansion trend. The 2026 plan remains at 14 students, unchanged from 2025, with no signals of additional expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks approximately 114th, with a steady upward trend in recent years (from 120th in 2021 to 114th in 2026), indicating continuous improvement in overall strength. The Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 101st, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure. The reputation file shows no significant negative public opinion or enrollment drop records for Inner Mongolia University, maintaining a stable overall reputation. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Inner Mongolia University has no data for A- or above disciplines, and information on advantageous disciplines is lacking.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The Physics Category enrollment majors are mainly engineering fields such as Computer Science, Software Engineering, Electronic Information, Mechanical Engineering, and Vehicle Engineering. The 2026 major popularity analysis shows that Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are all 'highly recommended' or 'recommended', with engineering majors continuing to heat up. The total number of Liaoning Province college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 200,000, with Physics Category students estimated at about 146,000 (approximately 73% of total), an increase of about 2,600 compared to 2025 (143,400), leading to slightly intensified competition. Inner Mongolia University is located in Hohhot, Inner Mongolia, relatively close to Liaoning, and as a neighboring province university, it has some geographical appeal to Liaoning students. The number of students enrolled from Liaoning accounts for a small proportion of its total national enrollment (about 2–3%), making it a non-primary source province with limited flexibility in plan adjustments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization of historical rankings in recent two years, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, a slight increase in the total number of Physics Category students in Liaoning Province, and the continued heating up of engineering majors, it is expected that competition for admission in 2026 will slightly intensify, with rankings shifting slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 29458, with a range of 28958–29958.

If the ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<28958), prioritize Tier 1 popular majors such as Software Engineering and Mathematics and Applied Mathematics. If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>29958), it is advisable to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, prioritizing majors with lower ranking requirements such as Civil Engineering and Logistics Management.
